name: Broccoli Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 tsp Fresh grated ginger root or
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the broccoli and cut off the florets.
2. Slice the stems to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
3. Heat oil in a large skillet or wok, then stir-fry the broccoli for 5 minutes until it is crisp-tender.
4. In a small bowl, mix together the soy sauce and cornstarch.
5. Add honey, ginger (fresh grated root or ground ginger), and hot pepper sauce to the mixture; stir well.
6. Pour the sauce over the broccoli.
7. Cook for a short time until the sauce thickens slightly.
8. Stir in the slivered almonds.
